name: ts-mixin-class
description: TypeScript program transformer skeleton for class-level mixin decorators.

scripts.bench: pnpm --silent run build && node dist/bench/benchmark.suite.js all
scripts.bench:compile: pnpm --silent run build && node dist/bench/benchmark.suite.js compile
scripts.bench:edit: pnpm --silent run build && node dist/bench/benchmark.suite.js edit
scripts.bench:tsserver: pnpm --silent run build && node dist/bench/benchmark.suite.js tsserver
scripts.bench:transform: pnpm --silent run build && node dist/bench/benchmark.suite.js transform
scripts.fixture:declarations: pnpm --dir tests/fixture-suite run build:standard && pnpm --dir tests/declaration-fixture-suite run build && pnpm --dir tests/declaration-fixture-suite run test
scripts.fixture: pnpm --dir tests/fixture-suite run build && pnpm --dir tests/fixture-suite run test
